name: Fritz Kaegi
bio: Fritz Kaegi is the incumbent Cook County Assessor and a candidate in the 2026 Democratic primary. The assessor's office oversees property assessment values used in county tax billing. (Source: scout ballot context, March 13, 2026)

jacket.note: County race — ILSBE filing, not FEC.

career_history.highlight: Won on reform platform; overhauled assessment equity practices

policy_platform.position: Championed fair property assessment reform, reducing the longstanding 'regressivity' that over-taxed lower-value properties while undertaxing commercial real estate.
Created online appeal tracking, published assessment methodology, expanded data access. First assessor to publish detailed mass appraisal models.
Raised assessments on undervalued commercial and industrial properties; faced intense opposition from commercial real estate lobby.

social_pulse.summary: Positive among housing equity advocates and progressive media. Negative from commercial real estate and property tax appeal attorneys. Moderate name recognition overall.

trust_indicators.label: No confirmed corruption or ethics findings
